page_metadata.biotools__summary:
A multi-language package for spike train surrogate generation.

The Spike Sequence mime (SpiSeMe) package provides C++, Matlab and Python functions implementing four different algorithms for generation of surrogates of event (aka spikes) sequences. The algorithms provided by the package are.
